# CubeSolver AI

> Solve any Rubik's Cube fast: upload six face photos or enter the colors and get an optimal step-by-step solution.

CubeSolver AI scans a scrambled 3x3 Rubik's Cube from images or manual color input and returns the fastest solving sequence using the Kociemba two-phase algorithm, with a 3D cube you can step through move by move.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Scan or enter your cube colors and get an instant, step-by-step solution.
- [How to Solve a Rubik's Cube](/guide): Beginner-friendly Layer-by-Layer tutorial with notation and algorithms.
- [How to Solve a 2x2](/guide/2x2): Fastest way to learn your first cube in three easy steps.
- [How to Solve a 4x4](/guide/4x4): The reduction method plus both parity fixes.
- [How to Solve a Pyraminx](/guide/pyraminx): Beginner pyramid-puzzle tutorial.
- [Notation & Algorithms](/notation): Complete reference for cube notation and beginner algorithms.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about the solver and learning to solve.
- [About](/about): What CubeSolver AI does and the technology behind it.
- [Blog](/blog): Speedcubing tips, buying guides, and how solvers work.

## Optional

- [Robots](/robots.txt): Crawler rules.
- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): List of indexable pages.
